issues.description: DSL is missing the Blocker keyword effect entirely. Blocker is a static ability that should be represented as a separate effect with trigger 'OnAttacked' or similar passive mechanism.

The activated ability requires TWO actions: (1) trash 1 card from hand AND (2) place 1 Character with cost ≤2 at bottom of deck. DSL only shows trashing. The 'place at bottom of deck' action is missing entirely.

Trigger should be 'Activated' with proper main-phase activation context, but the condition and action structure don't capture the 'Once Per Turn' limitation at the DSL level (this may be handled elsewhere, but should be verified).
